violations.text: There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Soup was observed held at 113 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Soup was reheated at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The prep sink is in poor repair. Leak observed. A plumbing system must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

The the front food dispensing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
The prep sink is in poor repair. Leak observed. A plumbing system must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
